description: Regular size widget recreation from the four 2026-06-28 reference screenshots.

identity.background_mood: mauve album glass over warm macOS desktop
identity.typography: SF Pro native sans, bold white title and subtitle

Regular_Glass_Container.notes: Regular mode is a 300 x 360 clipped rounded card with mauve overlays and soft shadow.

Top_Left_X_Button.notes: Uses AlbumArtCloseButton with a 15 pt always-visible close control inset 7 pt.

Top_Right_Settings_Dots.notes: Uses the shared 18 pt black ellipsis popover trigger inset 9 pt from top/right.

Main_Artwork_and_Info.notes: Artwork fills the full card with a bottom caption gradient and centered stopped/title copy.

Playback_Controls.notes: Previous/play/next controls float over the artwork in white with subtle shadow.
